rationale: No conflict. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is unrelated to Educ. Code §21.0411, which governs waiver of educator certification examination fees.
quote: Sec. 21.0411. WAIVER OR PAYMENT OF CERTAIN EXAMINATION AND CERTIFICATION FEES.
_note: Rule text concerns educator certification fees; no overlap with property tax homestead exemption.
